# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.3] - 2026-07-15

### Documentation

- Record #84 under 0.1.2 ([#86](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/86))

### Features

- Port t1k-merge.py as `unum combine` ([#88](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/88))
- Port t1k-copynumber.py as `unum copy-number` ([#89](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/89))

## [0.1.2] - 2026-07-13

### Features

- Opt-in candidate pre-filter (--prefilter-frac) to skip DP for doomed candidates ([#83](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/83))
- Add descriptive long form to every argument ([#84](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/84))

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Add shared pre-push hook running the format and lint gates ([#79](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/79))

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.1] - 2026-07-10

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Updated the following local packages: unum-core

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [0.1.0] - 2026-07-10

### Bug Fixes

- Parity fixes from HPRC real-data differential (separator #39/#40 + truncated-mate-pair precedence) ([#44](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/44))

### Documentation

- Add fg-t1k design spec and Phase 0+1 implementation plan

### Features

- Emit _aligned_*.fa for assigned fragments (closes #43) ([#46](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/46))
- Opt-in {prefix}_metrics.tsv QC + discriminative-quality panel (closes #19, closes #30) ([#48](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/48))
- Opt-in HWE population allele-frequency prior on selection (closes #29)
- Opt-in --allele-freq-null-penalty selection penalty (null/expression variants) ([#69](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/69))
- Report per-allele identifiability in _metrics.tsv (closes #33) ([#50](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/50))
- Fused single-process pipeline with in-memory candidate hand-off (closes #28) ([#52](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/52))
- Streaming FASTQ read sources + unified -i/--input (Stage 1) ([#68](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/68))
- --bam-mode framework + coordinate alignment BAM dispatch (Stage 2a) ([#70](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/70))
- --bam-mode no-alignment (Class A ≡ FASTQ) + bounded-streaming pass-1 (Stage 2b) ([#72](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/72))
- Complete BAM/CRAM extraction — CRAM -r, run fusion, grouped-alignment one-pass (Stage 2c) ([#73](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/73))

### Miscellaneous Tasks

- Add CI, release automation, issue/PR templates, and README
- De-vendor T1K oracle, convert differentials to goldens, remove run, rename fg-t1k -> unum ([#53](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/53))
- Add release-plz publish workflow + crates.io metadata ([#56](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/56))

### Performance

- Parallelize FASTQ/BAM extractors (-t N), byte-identical output; per-worker scratch (folds 5ed804d) ([#34](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/34))
- Parallelize read-assignment loop (-t N), byte-identical output; per-worker align scratch (folds a35ed72/87478ac) ([#36](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/36))
- DP memoization, parallelism, allocator/index/sort — ~3.7x faster than stock, byte-identical ([#45](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/45))
- Parallelize read-reassignment loops (-t N), byte-identical (closes #42) ([#47](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/47))
- Reduce fused-run peak memory (drop extract index + free redundant consensus) ([#61](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/61))
- Share one reference-consensus copy via Arc<[u8]> ([#65](https://github.com/fg-labs/unum/pull/65))
